name: My Cool Tractor
original_name: ไอ้หนุ่มรถไถ
overview: Khaen is an Isan man born and raised in Bangkok. He dreams of living a comfortable life, but when he loses all his money to failed investments in the digital market, he decides to go back and receive his inheritance from Grandpa Khloi, his last remaining relative. However, it turns out the inheritance he receives is a large debt.

trailers.title: เตรียมพบกับเรื่องราวสุดจี๊ด ของ #ไอ้หนุ่มรถไถ เริ่มตอนแรก 29 มกรานี้  ทาง #ช่อง8
